bead.title: FEAT-024: Application Substrate — auto-generated TS client, admin UI, deployment templates
bead.description: Make Axon trivially deployable as backend for lightweight apps. Auto-generate TypeScript client from ESF schema, auto-generate admin UI, provide deployment templates for Cloud Run/Workers. Client-side validation matching server-side rules. See FEAT-024.
bead.acceptance: TypeScript client generated from schema compiles and works; client-side validation matches server-side; admin UI provides entity browser; deployment template produces running instance
